title: Mosvera Common Definitions
description: Shared definitions used across Mosvera v0.1 schemas. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0. $id is rooted at the canonical domain (https://mosvera.io/schema/0.1/); it is a stable namespace identifier and need not be dereferenceable.

field_name.description: A snake_case aesthetic field name per ADR-0005: ASCII lowercase, digits, underscore; must start with a letter. No hyphens, no uppercase, no dots, no leading $.

reference.description: A reference to another Mosvera primitive by name. Resolved lazily into the canonical model per MEP-0001; the reference graph MUST be a DAG (MEP-0001/0002 cycle-detection conformance requirement).

aesthetic_value.description: A value within an aesthetic object: a scalar, a nested aesthetic object, or a list. The aesthetic vocabulary is intentionally open at v0.1; only structure and naming are constrained.

aesthetic_object.description: A structured aesthetic object. Content keys are snake_case field names (ADR-0005). The composition/merge directives $unset and $revert (MEP-0001) are the only permitted $-prefixed keys; any other $-prefixed key is rejected. user-defined fields MUST NOT begin with $.

$unset.description: Remove the named fields from the result of merging this object (MEP-0001 deletion directive). Never overloads null as a deletion sentinel.

$revert.description: Roll the named fields back to the value held before this layer contributed (MEP-0001 partial rollback, modeled on CSS revert).

merge_strategy.description: Declares how a list-valued field merges, per MEP-0001. Carried as a schema annotation (x-mosvera-merge) on list fields; the default when absent is 'replace'. Index-based merge is forbidden.

key.description: Required when strategy is merge_by: the field name elements are correlated by (identity-based, not positional).

criticality.description: Whether a canonical construct is required (a provider that cannot represent it MUST error) or optional (a provider may degrade and warn). Per MEP-0003, modeled on glTF required/optional extensions. Default is declared per construct type.

lowering_action.description: How a provider adapter represents a canonical construct, per MEP-0003 (closed enum modeled on LLVM setOperationAction).
